reasoning: The PCI DSS control 1.3.1 focuses on ensuring that systems are not publicly accessible unless necessary. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network policies are in place to deny ingress and egress traffic by default, which prevents unauthorized access from external sources. Additionally, ensuring that services are not of type NodePort and that Ingress resources have TLS enabled helps prevent public exposure of services.
title: Requirement 1.3.1
